summary:
Step 4 'Expected the 'Özellikler' (Features) link to be visible.' failed. Error: TEST FAILURE

A primary 'Tournaments' navigation entry in the header is missing — the site shows tournament content on the page but no tournament button/link is present in the main navigation.

Observations:
- The header navigation contains the 'Özellikler' (Features) link (visible in the top navigation).
- No 'Turnuva' / 'Turnuvalar' / 'Yarış' button or link is present in the header/main navigation.
- The page body contains a 'TURNUVALAR' section and a 'Yarış ve Kazan' card, but these are in-page content rather than primary navigation items.
